clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall produce the corporate video described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] at [SHOOT_LOCATION] on [SHOOT_DATE].
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE], distinguishing internal-only distribution from external or advertising distribution as specified in [PERMITTED_USE].

The Service Provider shall keep confidential any non-public business information observed or disclosed while performing the Services, and shall not disclose it without the Client's prior written consent.
Where the Services include voice-over, the Service Provider shall provide voice-over recording in [VOICE_OVER_LANGUAGE] for an additional fee of [VOICE_OVER_FEE].
Where the Services include subtitles, the Service Provider shall provide subtitles in [SUBTITLE_LANGUAGES] for an additional fee of [SUBTITLE_FEE].
The Client may request delivery within [RUSH_DELIVERY_PERIOD_DAYS] days, in exchange for an additional fee of [RUSH_DELIVERY_FEE].
Where aerial footage is required, the Service Provider warrants that it holds any authorization required by applicable aviation regulation to operate a drone at [SHOOT_LOCATION].
The Client shall reimburse the Service Provider's reasonable, pre-approved travel expenses in addition to [TOTAL_VALUE].
Where the Client requires use beyond [PERMITTED_USE], the Parties shall agree an additional license fee of [EXTENDED_LICENSE_FEE] for the extended scope of [EXTENDED_PERMITTED_USE].
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [SHOOT_DATE] at [SHOOT_LOCATION], subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].

The Client may request up to [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds of revisions to the Deliverables at no additional charge. Additional revision rounds beyond this shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_REVISION_FEE] per round.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: Commercial Usage explicitly distinguishes internal vs. external distribution within the same Dynamic Field structure used in Photography's Commercial Usage Clause, maintaining cross-Market consistency while addressing this Contract Type's specific risk. Duplication: Voice-over and Subtitles kept as separate priced add-ons since they involve distinct production work. Loophole closed: Approval Process caps included revisions, closing a gap for unlimited free revision cycles. Contradiction: none. Missing protection: Confidentiality Required (not Optional), mirroring Corporate Photography's upgrade for the same underlying risk (exposure to business-sensitive environments). Complexity: Extended Licensing kept Conditional and separate from base Commercial Usage. Enforceability: revision cap and per-round fee both explicit. Attack: Client requests unlimited revisions claiming "revisions" was never bounded — mitigated by explicit Approval Process cap. Attack: Client uses an internal training video in a public ad campaign — mitigated by Commercial Usage's explicit internal/external distinction requiring Extended Licensing for broader use. Attack: Provider claims voice-over was included when Client never paid for it — mitigated: Voice-over Clause conditions inclusion and fee together. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
